name: Carole King
abstract: Carole King Klein (born Carol Joan Klein; February 9, 1942) is an American singer-songwriter and musician renowned for her extensive contributions to popular music. She wrote or co-wrote 118 songs that charted on the Billboard Hot 100 during the latter half of the 20th century and 61 songs that reached the UK charts, establishing her as …

works.t: (You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman

works_created.t: (You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman
(You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman

about_quotes.speaker: Ada Rovatti
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Was that the event that honored Carole King? [INTERVIEWEE] No. I think it was organized for the Monk Institute.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ada Rovatti interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 13, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Scott
about_quotes.evidence: So ’73 I think in the very beginning of the year I did a tune with Carole King called “Jazzman.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Scott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2022 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Hank Cicalo
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve worked with Lou and we did “Rhymes and Reasons,” “Fantasy,” and stuff with Carole King.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hank Cicalo interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 30, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Ralph LaLama
about_quotes.evidence: I loved James Taylor, I mean that’s not rock & roll, but you know. Who was the other — Laura Nyro, Carole King, yeah, and Jimi Hendrix. I loved Jimi Hendrix.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ralph LaLama interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 23, 2010

about_quotes.speaker: Ellen Rowe
about_quotes.evidence: Carole King, Carly Simon, James Taylor, Elton John — you know the first thing I figured out how to play on the piano... was “Your Song” by Elton John.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ellen Rowe interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 2, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Anne Phillips
about_quotes.evidence: And then I found out about demos for songwriters... there were the new kids coming in like Carole King and Gerry Goffin... all those people.
about_quotes.doc_title: Anne Phillips interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 24, 2025
